ogTitle: Hanging Rock vs Hanleys Creek: Climate Safety

heading: Hanging Rock vs Hanleys Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hanging Rock, New South Wales and Hanleys Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hanging Rock and Hanleys Creek have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Hanging Rock or Hanleys Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hanging Rock has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Hanleys Creek scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hanging Rock scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Hanleys Creek scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hanging Rock or Hanleys Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hanging Rock has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
